special.name: Sabor Verde — Mexican Special
special.description: A vegetarian Mexican feast, home-style: flavorful Mexican rice with beans, corn & bell peppers, a silky white cheese broccoli sauce, tandoori-style paneer, classic rajma, a high-fibre stir-fry, and fresh salsa on the side.
special._todo: POSTER PENDING: export this week's poster as public/assets/posters/2026-07-25-sabor-verde-mexican.png, then set poster to /assets/posters/2026-07-25-sabor-verde-mexican.png and fill posterWidth/posterHeight with its pixel size. Pages render a branded text layout until then.

portionsNote: Freshly made in limited quantities — order before Friday night to reserve yours.

items.name: Mexican Rice (500 ml)
items.detail: Flavorful Mexican rice with beans, corn & bell peppers

items.name: Rajma (250 ml)
items.detail: Classic kidney beans in spiced North Indian gravy

items.name: Stir Fry Vegetables (250 ml)
items.detail: High-fibre mix: corn, broccoli, cauliflower, carrot, beans, bell pepper

items.name: Salsa
items.detail: Add-on only — sold only alongside a Mexican Combo, not à la carte

combos.note: All combos include: Mexican Rice + White Cheese Broccoli Sauce + Tandoori Paneer + Rajma + Stir Fry Vegetables + Salsa.

tiers.name: Starter Meal
tiers.detail: 350 ml Mexican Rice, all sides 150 ml each, 35 g Paneer, Salsa

tiers.name: Simply Signature Meal
tiers.detail: 500 ml Mexican Rice, all sides 250 ml each, 60–75 g Paneer, Salsa

tiers.name: Extra Rice Meal
tiers.detail: Everything in the Simply Signature Meal, plus 250 ml extra Mexican Rice

tiers.name: Family Saver
tiers.detail: Double the Simply Signature Meal: 2× 500 ml Rice, all sides 500 ml each, 100 g Paneer, Salsa

mygateMessage:
🌵 Simply Signature — Sabor Verde Mexican Special, Saturday Lunch, 25 July 2026 🌵

This week: a vegetarian Mexican feast — Mexican rice with beans, corn & bell peppers, white cheese broccoli sauce, tandoori paneer, rajma, stir-fry vegetables & fresh salsa.

MEXICAN COMBOS (all include rice + sauce + paneer + rajma + stir-fry + salsa):
Starter Meal ₹350 (serves 1) · Simply Signature Meal ₹450 (serves 2, recommended) · Extra Rice Meal ₹500 (serves 3) · Family Saver ₹750 (serves 3–4, save ₹150)

À la carte also available: Mexican Rice ₹200 · White Cheese Broccoli Sauce ₹100 · Tandoori Paneer ₹100 · Rajma ₹80 · Stir Fry Veg ₹100 · Salsa ₹30 (combo add-on only)

Freshly made in limited quantities — 100% vegetarian, homemade at JVT-343.
Order before Friday 9:00 PM on WhatsApp: +91 97658 44659 (Gayathri Sriram)
Or order online: https://simplysignature.in/order

Premium Vegetarian • Home Cooked • Restaurant Relished 💛
